jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
